flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Mendocino College rose 28% between 2007 and 2010 ($521 → $666).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Mendocino College rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 ($8.4k → $10.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Mendocino College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Mendocino College rose 65% between 2007 and 2010 (2.3k → 3.8k).
